entity.label: Laadan
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: White, one of the two sons of Gershon, the son of Levi (Ex. 6:17; Num. 3:18, 21).

nodes.label: Laadan
nodes.description: White, one of the two sons of Gershon, the son of Levi (Ex. 6:17; Num. 3:18, 21).

nodes.label: Gershon
nodes.description:
'=Ger’shom expulsion, the eldest of Levi’s three sons (Gen. 46:11; Ex. 6:16).

In the wilderness the sons of Gershon had charge of the fabrics of the tabernacle when it was moved from place to place, the curtains, veils, tent-hangings (Num. 3: 21-26). Thirteen Levitical cities fell to the lot of the Gershonites (Josh. 21:27-33).

nodes.label: Shimei
nodes.description: A Levite of the family of Gershon (1 Chr. 6:42).

verses.text: The sons of Gershon; Libni, and Shimi, according to their families.
And these are the names of the sons of Gershon by their families; Libni, and Shimei.
And these be the names of the sons of Gershom; Libni, and Shimei.
Of Gershom; Libni his son, Jahath his son, Zimmah his son,
The son of Jahath, the son of Gershom, the son of Levi.
Of the Gershonites were, Laadan, and Shimei.
The sons of Laadan; the chief was Jehiel, and Zetham, and Joel, three.
The sons of Shimei; Shelomith, and Haziel, and Haran, three. These were the chief of the fathers of Laadan.
As concerning the sons of Laadan; the sons of the Gershonite Laadan, chief fathers, even of Laadan the Gershonite, were Jehieli.
